dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8767 IH: Compensation Fund Recrediting Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Self introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Veterans' Affairs

form.official-title: To amend the American Recovery and Reinvestment Act of 2009 to wind down the Filipino Veterans Equity Compensation Fund.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Compensation Fund Recrediting Act.

section.header: Sunset of the Filipino Veterans Equity Compensation Fund
section.text: Section 1002 of the American Recovery and Reinvestment Act of 2009 (Public Law 111–5; 38 U.S.C. 107 note) is amended—

paragraph.text: in subsection (l), by striking until expended and inserting until the date specified in subsection (m); and
by adding at the end the following new subsection:
this section shall cease to have any effect; and
any amounts in the compensation fund shall be deposited into the general fund of the Treasury.
